All requirements are met. Let me do a final verification.

{"analysis":"Everything matches perfectly: identical md5sums, compressed size 1054 bytes (under 2K), no references to mystery binary in the source, fully independent C program.","plan":"Final verification - ensure everything works from scratch by running the complete test command specified in the task.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cd /tmp && rm -f /app/image.ppm && gcc -static -o /tmp/reversed /app/mystery.c -lm && cd /app && /tmp/reversed 2>/dev/null && diff /tmp/original.ppm /app/image.ppm && echo 'IDENTICAL'\n","duration":60}]}
